title: Partytown & Third-Party Sandboxing
description: Implement Partytown to offload third-party scripts (e.g., analytics, marketing) to web workers. Apply sandboxing techniques to prevent external scripts from degrading main thread performance.
objectives: Implement Partytown to offload third-party scripts (e.g., analytics, marketing) to web workers.
Apply sandboxing techniques to prevent external scripts from degrading main thread performance.
